page_metadata.biotools__summary: Tool to deoptimize the RNA or DNA sequences based on codon usage. Codon-pair deoptimization involves increasing the frequency of underrepresented codon pairs without changing codon usage or amino acid sequences.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Tool to deoptimize the RNA or DNA sequences based on codon usage. Codon-pair deoptimization involves increasing the frequency of underrepresented codon pairs without changing codon usage or amino acid sequences.
